prompt:
Square fantasy RPG skill icon in the style of a dark AAA action-RPG skill icon set (Diablo / Path of Exile / Lost Ark). Low-key painterly digital painting, dramatic chiaroscuro. The subject FILLS THE ENTIRE SQUARE FRAME edge to edge, emerging from a solid deep near-black background with a subtle dark radial vignette in the corners. Strong colored energy glow radiating from within — sickly poison-green light seeping from the bread.

Subject: three or four round rustic medieval loaves of bread laid out on a dark stone altar like a dark sacrament, the loaves split and oozing a glowing sickly green-violet poison, faint tendrils of toxic spore-vapor rising, a few dark ergot horns baked into the crust. A blasphemous poisoned communion. Revenge served as a sacrament. 13th-century.

Muted palette of ash-black, burnt bread-brown and gold crust, with a searing poison-green and violet glow as the focal light source seeping from inside the bread. High detail, rich brushwork, soft sickly rim light, cinematic, ominous and moody. Centered altar composition. NO text, NO border or ornate frame, NO UI chrome, NO empty margins — the art bleeds to all four edges of the square.
